mapper.sql: select id, biz_code, order_no, form_data, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_biz_instance
mapper.select: where biz_code = #{bizCode} and order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into lc_biz_instance( biz_code, order_no, form_data, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{bizCode}, #{orderNo}, #{formData}, #{processInstanceId}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{workflowStatus}, #{currentTaskName}, #{submitter}, #{submitTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update lc_biz_instance set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
